Description: A deceptively rumpled but razor-sharp detective who uses strategic disorganization to disarm suspects and uncover truth.
A manipulative criminal who weaponizes charm, chaos, and lies to exploit victims for personal gain.
A desperate, chaotic huckster who uses disorganization as a survival mechanism to feed his family.
A boundary-violating stalker or infiltrator who weaponizes eagerness, naivety, and 'student energy' to gain proximity and access to a target.
